company.name: Innhance
company.description: Innhance is the intelligent WhatsApp AI agent that seamlessly converts guest inquiries into confirmed reservations for your boutique hotel.

hero.headline: Turn WhatsApp Chats into Hotel Bookings
hero.subheadline: Innhance is the intelligent WhatsApp AI agent that seamlessly converts guest inquiries into confirmed reservations for your boutique hotel.

storytelling.heading: The Friction
storytelling.description: Arnav sitting late night, laptop open, Multiple hotel tabs, WhatsApp chats, booking pages
storytelling.dialogue: Why is booking a hotel still this complicated?

storytelling.heading: The Frustration
storytelling.description:
Hotel website: slow replies 
 OTA: high commissions 
 WhatsApp: no response
storytelling.dialogue: Hotels are losing customers… not because of demand but because they reply too late

storytelling.heading: The Gap
storytelling.description: This is where hotels lose money every single day

storytelling.heading: The Realization
storytelling.dialogue: What if bookings could happen instantly… on WhatsApp itself?

storytelling.heading: The Idea
storytelling.dialogue: An AI that replies instantly answers queries and converts chats into bookings

storytelling.heading: Enters Khushi
storytelling.dialogue:
I met Khushi who understood growth, distribution, and how to take this to market..
 This is not just a tool,this can change how hotels sell

storytelling.heading: The Build Begins
storytelling.description: Late night calls, Figma screens, WhatsApp flows
storytelling.dialogue: Now we needed someone who could build this fast

storytelling.heading: Enters Harsh (Full Stack Dev)
storytelling.dialogue: Then came Harsh who turned the idea into an actual product

storytelling.heading: First Vision
storytelling.description:
WhatsApp bot Working 
 Our first working version was simple but it worked
storytelling.dialogue:
Guest: Price? 
 Bot: Here are your room options

storytelling.heading: First Wins
storytelling.dialogue:
Hotels started replying instantly 
  Guests started booking directly

storytelling.heading: The Shift
storytelling.dialogue:
Less dependency on OTAs 
 More direct bookings

storytelling.heading: Today
storytelling.dialogue:
Innhance was born 
 to help hotels convert conversations into revenue

storytelling.heading: Clean branding frame
storytelling.description:
From missed messages 
 to confirmed bookings

features.title: Instant Responses
features.description: AI-powered replies in seconds, ensuring no guest inquiry goes unanswered, day or night.

features.title: Multi-Language Support
features.description: Hindi, English, Tamil, Bengali, and 40+ languages to serve all Indian guests.

features.title: Smart Availability
features.description: Real-time sync with your booking system. Always shows accurate room availability.

features.title: UPI & Payment Integration
features.description: Support for UPI, cards, and all popular Indian payment methods with secure processing.

features.title: Data Privacy
features.description: Enterprise-grade encryption and compliance to protect guest information.

features.title: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Track conversion rates, response times, and guest satisfaction metrics in real-time.

guestJourney.title: Guest Sends Message
guestJourney.description: A potential guest messages your hotel on WhatsApp with a booking inquiry.

guestJourney.title: AI Processes Request
guestJourney.description: Innhance AI understands intent, checks availability, and crafts a reply.

guestJourney.title: Booking Confirmed
guestJourney.description: Guest receives instant confirmation, payment link, and booking details.

results.title: Save Hours Weekly
results.description: Automate repetitive booking inquiries and free up your staff to focus on delivering exceptional guest experiences.

results.title: Increase Revenue
results.description: Never miss a booking opportunity. Our AI responds instantly, even when you're offline.

results.title: Convert Inquiries
results.description: Lightning-fast responses and personalized interactions turn inquiries into confirmed bookings.

results.title: Boost Guest Satisfaction
results.description: Guests love instant responses. Improve ratings and build loyalty from first interaction.

testimonials.quote: Innhance ne hamari booking process completely transform kar di. Pehle hum raat ke inquiries miss kar dete the, ab 98% messages bookings mein convert ho rahe hain.
testimonials.author: Harshvardhan Singh

pricing.subtitle: शुरुआत
pricing.description: Perfect for small boutique hotels getting started

pricing.subtitle: प्रोफेशनल
pricing.description: Ideal for growing hotels with higher booking volume

pricing.subtitle: एंटरप्राइज
pricing.description: For hotel chains and luxury properties

launchOffer.title: 🎉 Special Launch Offer for Indian Hotels!
